creator: franco@opnsense.org
text:
Hi,

Tor does not generate manual pages when DOCS is off. A quick fix would be for MANPAGES to imply DOCS, but a more elegant solution would be favourable.

# make package OPTIONS_UNSET=DOCS BATCH=yes
===>  Building package for tor-0.3.0.6
pkg-static: Unable to access file /usr/ports/security/tor/work/stage/usr/local/man/man1/tor-gencert.1.gz:No such file or directory
pkg-static: Unable to access file /usr/ports/security/tor/work/stage/usr/local/man/man1/tor-resolve.1.gz:No such file or directory
pkg-static: Unable to access file /usr/ports/security/tor/work/stage/usr/local/man/man1/tor.1.gz:No such file or directory
pkg-static: Unable to access file /usr/ports/security/tor/work/stage/usr/local/man/man1/torify.1.gz:No such file or directory
*** Error code 1

Stop.
make: stopped in /usr/ports/security/tor


Cheers,
Franco
